description_long: This object is a sandwich with a thick, folded, and slightly glossy bread exterior that appears to envelop a filling. The bread has a light tan to golden-brown color with some darker creases and folds, giving it a soft, pillowy appearance. The filling is partially visible at the edges, showing a mix of beige and off-white tones, possibly representing meat or cheese. The surface of the bread is mostly matte with some subtle sheen, and the overall shape is irregular and compact, as if the sandwich has been pressed or folded. There are no visible toppings or condiments on the exterior, and the sandwich appears unwrapped and ready to eat. The object is free of any packaging, branding, or additional decorative elements.
description: A thick, folded sandwich with a soft, tan bread exterior and a partially visible filling, appearing unwrapped and ready to eat.
description_view_0: The sandwich is seen from a side angle, highlighting the folded bread and a glimpse of the filling at the opening.
description_view_1: This view shows the sandwich from a slightly different side, emphasizing the rounded, folded edge and more of the bread's surface.
description_view_2: From this angle, the sandwich's top and folded structure are most visible, with the bread's creases and compact form clearly shown.
description_view_3: This view reveals the opposite side, showing the irregular, pressed shape and a small portion of the filling peeking out.
